text: Faster WISCOR is an optimized implementation of OpenAI WISCOR automatic speech recognition model designed to provide significantly faster transcription speeds while maintaining high accuracy built on speed translate 2 inference engine. Faster WISCOR leverages efficient computation techniques such as model, quantization, gpu acceleration and optimized memory usage to reduce the latency and resource consumption. Compared to the original WISCOR implementation, it can transcribe audio several times faster and requires less memory, making it suitable for real-time applications like voice assistance, live captioning, meeting transcription and multilingual speech processing. Additionally, Faster WISCOR retains WISCOR's strong capabilities in multilingual speech recognition and translation, offering developers a practical and scalable solution for deploying speech-to-text systems in production environments.

Additionally, Faster WISCOR retains WISCOR's strong capabilities in multilingual speech recognition  and translation, offering developers a practical and scalable solution for deploying speech-to-text  systems in production environments.
